text: I speak English, and I am improving.

The bag is heavy. I'll carry it for you.
The waiter is here. I'll have the fish, please.
Don't worry. I won't be late. I promise.
A question for you. Will you join us for dinner?
Good evening. I am Professor Lang, the rector of the university here. Welcome. May I sit next to you?
Of course, Professor Lang. Please, sit down. I'll move my bag for you.
Thank you, that is very kind. The waiter is coming. Would you like water or wine?
I'll have some water, please. Thank you.
Tell me, are you going to present at the conference tomorrow?
Yes, I am going to present in the morning. It is on the agenda already.
Wonderful. We have a small request. Our speaker for Friday is not available. Will you say a few words?
That is a big request. It depends on the schedule, but I'll do my best. I won't take much of your time.
Short and clear is always better. I think it will be a great session.
I agree. I'll prepare a short talk about leadership immediately. I promise.
I agree. I think it will be a great idea.
I disagree. In my opinion, it depends on the time.
Don't worry, I'll handle it.
I'll have some water, please.
It depends on the schedule, but I'll do my best.
Will you join us for dinner? Yes, I will.
I agree. I think it will be a great opportunity.

Hello, Maria Clara. This is Daniel from the international office. I have a quick update for you. The rector of the Chinese delegation will arrive on Thursday, not on Friday. He has a small request: he would like a short meeting with you before the conference. In my opinion, it will be a very good opportunity. If you are available on Thursday afternoon, I will confirm the time immediately. Please reply when you can. Thank you, and have a good evening.

Good evening, everyone, and welcome to the official dinner. Here is the plan for tonight. In a few minutes, the waiters will serve the first course. After dinner, our host will make a short speech. Tomorrow, the conference will start at nine o'clock in the morning. If you have any request, our team is available at the front desk. We will not change the program tonight. Thank you very much, and please enjoy your evening.
Good evening. I am very happy to meet you. I'll have some water, please. And yes, I'll say a few words on Friday. I promise I won't be long.
